subject: Skuntank, a larger evolved skunk Pokemon crouching in a dark forest environment
description: A larger, bulkier skunk-like Pokemon crouches low in a darkened forest or cave setting. Its body is dark purple-black with a pale stripe pattern visible along its body. The background is shadowy with purple-tinged darkness, trees or cave walls barely visible. The creature's posture is low and threatening — it seems poised to spray or lunge. The overall mood is ominous, aided by the dark color palette and shadowed environment.
foreground: large dark purple-black skunk Pokemon crouching low
background: shadowed forest or cave, purple-dark tones
